title: Bengaluru Horror: 19-Year-Old Gives Birth In Toilet, Fearing Social Stigma, Slits Newborn’s Throat & Dumps Body In Bag
description: Unmarried 19-year-old employee allegedly killed her baby inside iPhone maker Foxconn’s facility in the rural outskirts of Bengaluru. The newborn’s body lay undiscovered overnight before shocking find triggered police probe.
